## XBus interface

The events bus that allows emitting and subscribing to [XEventsTypes](./x-components.xeventstypes.md)<!-- -->.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export interface XBus 
```

## Methods

|  Method | Description |
|  --- | --- |
|  [emit(event)](./x-components.xbus.emit.md) | Emits an event with the <code>void</code> type associated as payload. |
|  [emit(event, payload, metadata)](./x-components.xbus.emit_1.md) | Emits an event with a non-void payload. |
|  [on(event, withMetadata)](./x-components.xbus.on.md) | Retrieves the observable for an event. |
|  [on(event, withMetadata)](./x-components.xbus.on_1.md) | Retrieves the observable for an event. |
|  [on(event, withMetadata)](./x-components.xbus.on_2.md) | Retrieves the observable for an event. |
